title: Allies Join the Rescue
description: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Franky, Nami, Zoro. Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
summary: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
